title: cheirolophus grandifolius
intro: Cheirolophus grandifolius, also known as the giant silver tree or giant tree daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to the islands of the Atlantic Ocean, particularly in the Azores and Madeira. The medicinal properties of Cheirolophus grandifolius include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that have been used to promote health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
